formula_note: Piecewise-linear integration of city-core civilian exposure using 30.4375 days per person-month. Nodes: low 2,000 (2014-10-06) -> 200 (2014-10-08) -> 200 (2014-10-15) -> 0 (2015-01-27); best 2,500 -> 300 -> 300 -> 0; high 3,000 -> 500 -> 500 -> 0.
uncertainty_note: This denominator is publishable only as a partial exposure scaffold because the opening 6 October node is inferred from evacuation reporting rather than a clean in-town census.
quality_note: Useful for documenting the collapse of the city-core civilian denominator, but too assumption-heavy to rescue the full DR.
